title: CIM Presales Solution Architect
description:
Mission of the Role
As a CIM Presales Solution Architect, you will be the pivotal technical bridge between our innovative CIM/AI product suite and our global clients. Your mission is to architect compelling, technically robust solutions that demonstrate how our technology solves critical manufacturing challenges, ultimately driving commercial success and forging trusted advisor relationships with key stakeholders in the semiconductor and advanced manufacturing industries.

Key Responsibilities

  • Partner with the sales team to develop and execute account-specific technical sales strategies for targeted clients.
  • Lead deep-dive discovery workshops to analyze client manufacturing processes, pain points, and technical requirements.
  • Design and present customized solution architectures, demonstrating how our CIM platform integrates AI capabilities to address operational efficiency, yield management, and Industry 4.0 objectives.
  • Develop and deliver high-impact proofs of concept (POCs), technical presentations, and product demonstrations tailored to both technical and executive audiences.
  • Create detailed technical proposals, RFP/RFI responses, and solution documentation that clearly articulate value propositions, implementation approaches, and competitive advantages.
  • Serve as the primary technical advisor throughout the sales cycle, building credibility and managing technical objections.
  • Synthesize market feedback and competitive intelligence to inform product strategy and roadmap priorities.

Essential Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in Industrial Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.
  • 5+ years of combined experience in a presales/solutions architecture role AND hands-on implementation or engineering within manufacturing systems (MES, EAP, CIM, SCADA, or related platforms).
  • Strong foundational understanding of semiconductor manufacturing processes (e.g., Fab, Assembly & Test, PCB) or related high-precision industries.
  • Excellent presentation, communication, and storytelling skills, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear business value.
  • Professional fluency in both English and Chinese (written and spoken) is mandatory for client engagements and internal collaboration.
  • Willingness to travel internationally (approximately 70-90%) to support regional sales activities, conferences, and key client meetings.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Direct experience with Industry 4.0 standards, digitization projects, or AI/ML applications in a production environment.
  • Practical knowledge of key technologies such as SQL, data modeling, system integration (APIs, SEMI standards), and cloud infrastructure.
  • Proven ability to thrive in a global, cross-cultural team environment.
